title: stephanopappus reflexus
intro: Stephanopappus reflexus, also known as the reflexed Stephanopappus, is a flowering plant species within the daisy family, Asteraceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Stephanopappus reflexus include treating various ailments such as fever, colds, and respiratory issues, as well as being used as an antiseptic to treat wounds and skin conditions. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in various forms of herbal preparations.
